segment.source: Renders a two-column block pairing an eyebrow badge, heading, rich-text lead, and CTA button with one large lightbox-zoomable image, positioned left or right. Use it for: spotlighting a single feature, screenshot, or product visual with explanatory copy — one image, one pitch. Prefer 'Alternating Feature Section' for several image-and-text rows in sequence; 'Feature Highlight Banner' for the same pairing on a colored background; 'Split Text & Media' for general editorial text with media.
